programme.title: BBC World News: America

programme.desc: An analysis of current events with a news summary, discussions, and news features.

programme.title: Behind the Woman: You're the Last Chance Someone Gave You
The Queen at War
programme.desc: Learn how the longest reigning monarch in British history was shaped by World War II. Princess Elizabeth’s experiences during the war mirrored those of the public and helped shape her into the Queen she is today.

programme.title: American Experience: George W. Bush
programme.desc: Examine the evolution of Bush’s presidency, from the war in Iraq to his second-term challenges, including Hurricane Katrina and the 2008 financial crisis.

programme.title: Amanpour and Company

programme.title: On Story: On Writing to All the Boys I've Loved Before

programme.title: Civilizations: How Do We Look?
programme.desc: Explore the many functions of the human image in ancient art. Portraits, paintings and sculptures, both life-size and colossal, performed a role—assuaging loss, expressing strength, inspiring fear—and were instrumental in forming early civilizations.

programme.title: Civilizations: God and Art
programme.desc: Trace the relationship between religion and art, which has inspired some of the most ingenious, affecting, majestic and breathtaking works of art ever made. Yet beneath great works of religious art often lie conflict, intrigue and risk.

programme.title: American Experience: George W. Bush
programme.desc: Trace Bush’s youth and his unorthodox road to the presidency via the contested election of 2000. His new administration’s focus on domestic issues was abruptly brought to a halt by the terrorist attacks of 9/11.

programme.title: Sit and Be Fit: Brain and Balance
programme.desc: Unusual exercises for brain stimulation and help with balance are highlighted.

programme.desc: The main Cybrany is under attack. Hacker, disguised as an exterminator called the Vermin Vexer, has released a mysterious cyberbug that is systematically destroying certain information, but Ms. Fileshare, the overworked Cybrarian, is too busy to notice.

programme.title: Molly of Denali: Suki’s Bone/ Brand New Flag
programme.desc: When Suki digs up an old bone tool covered with markings, Molly, Tooey, and Oscar discover the playful pooch has made an important archeological discovery. Molly announces a contest to design an original flag for the Denali Trading Post.

programme.title: Nova: Jupiter
programme.desc: Jupiter's massive gravitational force made it a wrecking ball when it barreled through the early solar system. But it also shaped life on Earth, delivering comets laden with water and perhaps even the fateful asteroid that wiped out the dinosaurs.

programme.title: History Detectives: Amelia Earhart Plane/Fillmore Pardon/Boxcar Home
programme.desc: A contributor believes he is the proud owner of a piece of Amelia Earhart's plane. A man inherited what looks like a signed presidential pardon from 1851. A couple believes their home was constructed from old boxcars.

programme.title: Get the Math
programme.desc: Middle and high school students are helped to develop algebraic thinking skills for solving real-world problems.

programme.title: 8 Days: To the Moon and Back
programme.desc: Join Apollo 11 on its historic journey. Film seamlessly blends mission audio featuring conversations among Neil Armstrong, Buzz Aldrin and Michael Collins with new footage, NASA archive and stunning CGI to recreate the first moon landing.

programme.title: Nova: Jupiter
programme.desc: Jupiter's massive gravitational force made it a wrecking ball when it barreled through the early solar system. But it also shaped life on Earth, delivering comets laden with water and perhaps even the fateful asteroid that wiped out the dinosaurs.

programme.title: Genius by Stephen Hawking: Can We Travel in Time?
programme.desc: Scientist Stephen Hawking challenges three ordinary people to determine if time travel is possible. The fascinating journey of discovery features DeLoreans, atomic clocks, a giant black hole and a large swath of New York City.

programme.title: The Great American Read: Heroes
programme.desc: Follow the trials and tribulations of some of literature's favorite protagonists.

programme.title: Native America: From Caves to Cosmos
programme.desc: Combine ancient wisdom and modern science to answer a 15,000-year-old question: who were America’s First Peoples? The answer hides in Amazonian cave paintings, Mexican burial chambers, New Mexico’s Chaco Canyon and waves off California’s coast.

programme.title: Native America: Nature to Nations
programme.desc: Explore the rise of great American nations, from monarchies to democracies. Investigate lost cities in Mexico, a temple in Peru, a potlatch ceremony in the Pacific Northwest and a tapestry of shell beads in upstate New York.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Smoked
programme.desc: A key witness in a rape case is murdered during an afternoon shopping trip with her daughter.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Rhodium Nights
programme.desc: When an underaged escort is found dead at a wild bachelor party, Captain Cragen cautions his team to investigate with discretion, as there were several high profile people at the scene.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Her Negotiation
programme.desc: Detective Rollins has a bad feeling about a suspect and calls on the entire SVU squad for help. A shocking theory comes to light, the situation rapidly escalates and Detective Benson is put into mortal danger.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Surrendering Noah
programme.desc: Sgt. Benson and ADA Barba take Johnny D to trial for sex trafficking, rape, assault and kidnapping. In an intense courtroom showdown, the SVU face a threat that could change the squad forever.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Sanctuary
programme.desc: The unexpected release of a suspect in a hate crime case leaves Benson and Barba caught between two families seeking justice for their loved ones.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Remember Me Too
programme.desc: Benson's suspicions about a kidnapping victim uncover a dangerous criminal network prepared to silence anyone who gets in their way.

programme.title: Modern Family: Finding Fizbo
programme.desc: Cam is enraged when he receives an online video showing someone has been desecrating his beloved Fizbo costume, which sets him on a quest to restore Fizbo's good name.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Graduates
programme.desc: In the season finale, Manny's father, Javier, shows up for his graduation and takes him out on a wild night of celebration, and then Jay steps in to pick up the pieces.

programme.title: Modern Family: Brushes With Celebrity
programme.desc: The Pritchett-Dunphy-Tucker clan recount all their biggest celebrity encounters. Phil shows a house to his musical hero and is determined to make a good impression despite the intense pain radiating from a very inconvenient part of his body.

programme.title: Modern Family: Tough Love
programme.desc: After leaving his real estate firm to strike out on his own, Phil decides a solo camping trip in the wild will be just what he needs to boost his confidence. Meanwhile, Mitchell plans to teach Cam and Lily a lesson.

programme.title: Modern Family: No Small Feet
programme.desc: When Claire lands a big opportunity for Pritchett's Closets, Jay expects a little validation for his contribution, and Pam's ex-boyfriend Bo shows up and Mitchell sees this as the perfect opportunity to get Pam out of the house.

programme.title: Modern Family: He Said, She Shed
programme.desc: Claire's request to build a 'She Shed' in their backyard is denied by the homeowner's association and only Luke and Phil know the real reason why.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Stepping Stone
programme.desc: The Intelligence unit investigates a string of murders linked to a Colombian drug cartel. Meanwhile, a rookie is pulled from the police academy to join the team.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Wrong Side of the Bars
programme.desc: Antonio's son was kidnapped, and he has a feeling the Columbian drug gang is to blame. The Columbian gang leader is being held in jail and suggests his release may trigger the release of Diego.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Chin Check
programme.desc: After the discovery of large amounts of cop killer ammo, the Intelligence Unit is in a quest to find the source.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Now Is Always Temporary
programme.desc: The intelligence squad is in hot pursuit of a counterfeiting ring as Atwater and Burgess come across something unexpected in a hoarder's home.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Leaving Las Vegas
programme.desc: Catherine and Nick hit the road in an attempt to link a killing in another town to a recently released Las Vegas murder suspect. Meanwhile, Gil Grissom says goodbye to his colleagues and heads east for a teaching sabbatical.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: The 3rd Choir
programme.desc: When the team learns that someone from their past is targeting one of their own, they desperately search the city. Meanwhile, Operational Psychologist Nate Getz visits Nell to help her through her traumatic experience.

programme.title: NCIS: Freedom
programme.desc: The NCIS team springs into action to find the assailant responsible for beating a marine to death in his own backyard.

programme.title: NCIS: A Man Walks Into a Bar
programme.desc: The NCIS team undergoes mandatory psych evaluations while investigating the death of a naval commander.

programme.title: NCIS: Defiance
programme.desc: A botched assassination attempt in Belgravia forces NCIS to protect the defence minister's daughter, who is studying in the U.S. and is smitten with McGee. Meanwhile, Gibbs investigates the death of a marine who was killed in a bombing.

programme.title: NCIS: Kill Screen
programme.desc: The dismembered fingertips and teeth of a murdered marine are discovered in the stolen purse of a pickpocket, launching NCIS on a mission to find a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: NCIS: One Last Score
programme.desc: NCIS learns that one of its former investigative assistants, found stabbed to death, was selling details on how to rob a warehouse full of possessions belonging to a woman convicted of fraud. Meanwhile, a new special agent joins the office.

programme.title: NCIS: Status Update
programme.desc: After the body of a thief is found in a marine's house, the team discovers the calling card of a terror group Delilah and the Department of Defense have been tracking.

programme.title: NCIS: Patience
programme.desc: The murder of a petty officer sparks a lead in a 40-year-old airport bombing cold case that Gibbs and DiNozzo have been assigned to for the past two years. Also, McGee is jealous that he was not previously briefed on the cold case.

programme.title: NCIS: No Good Deed
programme.desc: DiNozzo is partnered with his girlfriend, ATF Special Agent Zoé Keates, after evidence reveals that the murder weapon in an NCIS case was originally purchased for the controversial ATF sting operation.

programme.title: NCIS: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: Gibbs and Bishop travel to Afghanistan after the murder of a marine in D.C. is linked to a terror group holding another marine hostage overseas. DiNozzo is upset that McGee was chosen to be the new face of NCIS for all recruitment brochures.

programme.title: Movie: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Dr. Ian Malcolm follows his girlfriend to an island inhabited by dinosaurs to study them in their natural habitat. Disaster strikes and the group find themselves in the ultimate fight for survival.

programme.title: Movie: The Goonies
programme.desc: When a group of children stumble upon a treasure map, they embark on a harrowing mission to recover the treasure of a notorious 17th century pirate.

programme.title: Movie: Jumanji
programme.desc: A young boy and girl find a board game in their new home and begin to play it, only to realize that the actions in the game become reality. Once the game begins it cannot be stopped until they have played it all the way through.

programme.title: The 700 Club

programme.title: Movie: Step Up
programme.desc: A ballerina from a wealthy family wants to incorporate hip hop to her repertoire and learns lessons about dancing and life from a tough kid from the wrong side of Baltimore.

programme.title: Movie: Love by Chance
programme.desc: A woman's mother is obsessed with her lack of love life and secretly sets her up with who she sees as the perfect man, but she just wants to run her restaurant.

programme.title: Movie: A Valentine's Match
programme.desc: A reality TV host is fired from her job and so she returns home before Valentine's Day. While home, she finds herself running the town's festival, with her ex-fiancé and their two, scheming mothers.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: And Then There Was One

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Bedtime Story
programme.desc: When the girls learn that a number of relatives are going to be visiting, they reminisce about times they've had to share a bed and strange places they've had to sleep, including a train station.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Forgive Me, Father

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Long Day's Journey Into Marinara
programme.desc: Sophia's sister, Angela arrives in Miami for a visit and decides to move there but while she's looking for an apartment Dorothy invites her to stay with the girls. This ticks off Sophia since she thinks that Angela is after everything that she has.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Whose Face Is This, Anyway?
programme.desc: Blanche is convinced that her beauty is fading after attending her high school reunion and discovers many of her classmates have had face lifts. Meanwhile, Rose is making a home movie for class she's taking.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dorothy's Prized Pupil
programme.desc: Dorothy feels that it's her fault when her prized pupil wins a writing contest which inadvertently signals the INS that he’s an illegal alien.

programme.title: Frasier: Goodnight, Seattle
programme.desc: When Martin reserves the wedding hall for the wrong date, Niles and Frasier offer to help.

programme.title: Frasier: Goodnight, Seattle
programme.desc: When Martin reserves the wedding hall for the wrong date, Niles and Frasier offer to help.

programme.title: Frasier: The Good Son
programme.desc: Frasier's new life in Seattle is disrupted when his father, Martin, moves in.

programme.title: Frasier: Space Quest
programme.desc: Frasier tries to find a quiet corner to read his book, but he is always disturbed.

programme.title: Frasier: Dinner at Eight
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles take their father out for a meal but end up at The Timber Mill instead.

programme.title: Frasier: I Hate Frasier Crane
programme.desc: A newspaper critic puts down Frasier's radio show, forcing him to retaliate on the air.

programme.title: Frasier: Here's Looking at You
programme.desc: Martin uses a telescope to scope out a romantic interest in the adjacent building.

programme.title: Frasier: The Crucible
programme.desc: Frasier throws a dinner party to showcase his new painting, only to have the artist declare it a forgery. His attempt at retribution is foiled by a frightened Niles.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Visitor From Italy
programme.desc: Lucy tries to reunite a Venetian gondolier with his brother who lives in America.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Off to Florida
programme.desc: On their way to a vacation in Florida, Lucy and Ethel go through some trying times.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Deep-Sea Fishing
programme.desc: Woman's shopping habits versus man's fishing prowess becomes an item for discussion.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Desert Island
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel scheme to have their pleasure boat run out of gas at sea.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: While Dorothy and Rose are planning a hospital charity banquet, Blanche falls for Jake, the caterer hired for the event. She quickly learns he's more blue jeans than a black tie which prompts her to foolishly put a stop to their romance.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Son-in-Law Dearest
programme.desc: Dorothy's daughter arrives after she learns that her husband is cheating on her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: To Catch a Neighbor
programme.desc: Two police detectives stake out the girls' home to investigate the neighbors whom are believed to be dealers in stolen gems.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Piece of Cake
programme.desc: While preparing for a friend's birthday party, the girls recall past birthdays, including Rose's surprise birthday party for Dorothy, a surprise birthday party for Blanche and a memory of Sophia's birthday involving her late-husband Sal.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Empty Nests
programme.desc: Renee is feeling depressed and lonely with her children grown up and moved out and her husband's workaholic habits.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Old Friends
programme.desc: Dorothy learns that Sophia's new friend is suffering from Alzheimer's disease.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Nathan Parsons from the movie 'A Feeling Home' stops by as does Paul Green from 'When Calls the Heart' and Thom Filicia from 'Get a Room With Carson & Thom.'

programme.title: Movie: Summer in the City
programme.desc: When a small town woman with southern charm is given a big promotion managing a store in the Big Apple, she tries to adopt a big city personality and it leads to disastrous results.

programme.title: Movie: Summer Love
programme.desc: A struggling single mom is studying to become an accountant. When her young daughter goes off to sleepaway camp, Maya accepts a summer internship at Kizzmit, a tech company, for college credit.

programme.title: Movie: Love in Winterland
programme.desc: A woman is a final contestant on a dating show and faces off against her high-school sweetheart during the 'Hometown Date.'

programme.title: The Office: Jury Duty
programme.desc: After Jim returns from jury duty, Dwight questions him about every detail of his case. Meanwhile, Angela and the senator welcome their new baby.

programme.title: The Office: Tallahassee
programme.desc: After Dwight and his team arrive in Tallahassee, Dwight competes with his coworkers to impress Sabre special projects president, Nellie Bertram.

programme.title: The Office: After Hours
programme.desc: Andy makes everyone in the office stay late in order to cover for those who went to Florida.

programme.title: The Office: Test the Store

programme.title: The Office: The Last Day in Florida
programme.desc: Jim tries to save Dwight from being fired after Robert California reveals that he hates Nellie's business plan. Meanwhile, Andy learns that Erin isn't coming back to Scranton.

programme.title: The Office: Get the Girl
programme.desc: Andy makes a life-altering decision and drives across the country to pursue Erin. Meanwhile, Nellie shows up in Scranton and tries to claim the manager position.

programme.title: Drunk History: World War II
programme.desc: German troops are duped by a group of artists known as the Ghost Army. Japanese interned at camps began to resist. Hitler's nephew joins team U.S.A.

programme.title: Drunk History: S.O.S.

programme.title: Drunk History: Charleston

programme.title: Drunk History: Behind Enemy Lines
programme.desc: Marina Raskova forms an all-women air force regiment to fight Nazis in World War II, and smuggler James J. Andrews hijacks a Confederate train for the Union.

programme.desc: When their car breaks down, Doug and Carrie realize they will have to buy a new one.

programme.desc: Much to Doug's dismay, Carrie insists that his friend Spence needs a woman in his life.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Best Man
programme.desc: Doug attends a wedding after discovering that Carrie and the groom were once lovers.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Dog Days

programme.title: The King of Queens: Crappy Birthday
programme.desc: Carrie is so depressed about turning 30 that she doesn't even want to go out.

programme.title: The King of Queens: S'ain't Valentine

programme.desc: Carrie gets a ticket and Doug suggests that she go out on a date with the policeman.

programme.desc: When the shift supervisor at work suddenly dies, Doug gets his job and Carrie is thrilled.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Rayney Day
programme.desc: Doug makes plans to hang out with Richie, until Ray Barone suggests a game of golf.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Where's Poppa?
programme.desc: Doug ends up in Dr. Becker's waiting room after being hit by a foul ball at a Mets game.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Train Wreck
programme.desc: Doug is disappointed when Carrie isn't jealous of his beautiful new trainee.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Hungry Man
programme.desc: Doug embarrasses Carrie when he arrives unprepared at her boss's elegant cocktail party.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Time Share
programme.desc: The neighbours are separating and have a time-share for sale in the Hamptons.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Art House
programme.desc: Doug's patience with Arthur's eccentricities fades after he almost gets Doug fired.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Maybe Baby
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie contemplate having a baby; Doug talks to Arthur about fatherhood.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Queasy Rider
programme.desc: Doug feels the road calling and, against Carrie's advice, buys himself a motorcycle.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murdered Babysitter
programme.desc: A babysitter is found brutally murdered in Santa Ana, California, with five young children left in the home unscathed. The parents are quick to point to a local transient who had previously burglarized the house.

programme.title: The Killer Truth: Deadly Drive
programme.desc: What appears to be a fatal car crash in Wright County, Missouri turns out to be more sinister than police anticipated when the victim is found with two gunshot wounds to the head.

programme.title: The Killer Truth: Blade of Betrayal
programme.desc: When a wealthy New York woman is found brutally murdered her home, detectives learn that her family isn’t as picture perfect as they seem.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Ride to the Rescue
programme.desc: A Sacramento law student is convicted after a brutal home invasion and murder. Her cause seems lost until Joyce Ride, mother of Sally Ride, becomes intrigued with the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search after a mother of two young children went missing. Days later they found her body. Then the case went cold for twenty years, until advances in technology allowed the investigators to see the case in a new light.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters
programme.desc: Hunters stumble upon a scene that includes a skull and small bones, bits of clothing, a woman's shoe, and a strand of hair. Police determine a woman was stabbed to death, and reconstruct an image of her face to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: A Killer Disguise
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered in a crowded parking lot in broad daylight.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Letter
programme.desc: The sudden and mysterious death of a health conscious woman triggers an investigation into what killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Family Tree
programme.desc: After the brutal slaying of a young couple on a road trip, the victims’ families begin receiving disturbing letters.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Barn
programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Point of Origin
programme.desc: In 1984, California was riddled with 10 arson fires in three weeks. When some evidence points to other fires further up north, the investigation widens and continues until a fingerprint is finally found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: A well-respected nurse in a small community dies in a car accident. Investigators suspect drunk driving, until test results come back showing no alcohol was ingested.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Forensics By Fire
programme.desc: Did Daniel Dougherty commit murder by arson, or did the fire science used to convict him get it wrong?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: A man calls 911 saying his girlfriend shot herself, but the autopsy reveals that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: A Native American woman is found murdered less than 10 miles from where a male Native American was murdered two years earlier. Police begin to wonder if a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking News
programme.desc: When a young reporter is murdered in her apartment, and the two suspects are cleared of any wrongdoing, police must turn to a databank of well over 8000 felons to catch the killer, leading to the first conviction in the U.S, based on this evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: Police must investigate one of their own when a detective says his wife shot herself in the head. While he claims he called 911 as soon as he could, evidence makes police doubt the detective's story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: When a woman dies after a long illness, investigators have to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide, or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bound for Jail
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in a ravine, police are stuck, as any evidence was washed away by storms. 20 years after the fact, an old hat and a tiny chip of metal put investigators back on the trail of a case long gone cold.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.desc: This is the shocking and gruesome mystery of John Wayne Gacy, a popular Chicago businessman and part-time clown who was leading a double life in the 1970s. By day he was a community leader and by night a predator of young men.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Ambush
programme.desc: A mysterious murder in an upscale community is solved by cell phone forensics.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Last Gasp
programme.desc: After a young mom is found brutally murdered in her home, investigators find startling clues on her cell phone that could lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: The Killer Truth: Blade of Betrayal
programme.desc: When a wealthy New York woman is found brutally murdered her home, detectives learn that her family isn’t as picture perfect as they seem.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: A Frozen Finish
programme.desc: It the finale for the greenhorns and some have succeeded in their quests to become Bering Sea crab fisherman while others won't be coming back. The 2007 Opilio crab tallies are in and a winner is declared.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Ohana
programme.desc: Josh and his crew get an opportunity to supply ahi and mahi to a local restaurant and hope Phil's notes will lead them to a big payday. It's their first chance to turn a profit but if they want to succeed, they must first learn the Hawaiian way.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: On Deck: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Crawling with facts and bonus scenes: The Bering Sea captains rally after a fierce battle with typhoon Hagibis. Now they must step back up against the Russians even if it means war.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bering Sea Pirate
programme.desc: Sig and Mandy bet on a colourful new tactic to turn the tide of their King Crab season. Summer Bay's port main engine throws a wrench in Bill's plans. Johnathan lets Jake in on a Time Bandit secret. Josh calls in Johnathan for help with Phil's charts.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Harris Bloodline
programme.desc: On the 10th anniversary of Captain Phil Harris' final season on the Bering Sea, Josh Harris makes a personal journey to rediscover what made his father a legend, and embrace the legacy he inherits as Phil's son and co-captain of the Cornelia Marie.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bering Sea Pirate
programme.desc: Sig and Mandy bet on a colourful new tactic to turn the tide of their King Crab season. Summer Bay's port main engine throws a wrench in Bill's plans. Johnathan lets Jake in on a Time Bandit secret. Josh calls in Johnathan for help with Phil's charts.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Casey and the New Cornelia Marie
programme.desc: Heading into the most challenging season yet, the Cornelia Marie is showing her age. Now, with an additional million dollars in quota to catch, Casey and Josh must transform the decaying vessel into the crabber of the future.

programme.title: Bushcraft Build-Off: Double or Nothing
programme.desc: In a special mega episode, top bushcraft masters go head to head building both a bridge over a river and a waterproof shelter using nothing but 3 hand tools and the materials they find in Utah's spruce forest, when a sudden snowfall interrupts.

programme.title: Bushcraft Build-Off: Hunting Season
programme.desc: It's sink or swim when Matt Graham challenges top Bushcrafters to create a working watercraft using only one tool and the natural resources around them, capable of carrying three people and their supplies across Utah's Alpine Lake.

programme.title: Legends of the Wild: Blood in the Water
programme.desc: Crocodiles, the apex predator of Australia's Northern Territory, are mysteriously showing up dead, belly-up in the water, with no clear sign of visible trauma.

programme.title: Legends of the Wild: Executioner of the Andes
programme.desc: In Ecuador, a spree killer is loose in the wild as cows and other livestock are being mutilated in terrifying ways and left uneaten. Could it be proof the mythical Andean Mountain Wolf could in have some basis in fact?

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Cobbers Nightmare
programme.desc: The Raneys continue rescuing the Broadhead's tire bale homestead in Central Ohio. The clock is ticking in part two of this rescue as Marty, Misty, and Matt work to provide fresh water, strengthen walls, and jumpstart an indoor garden.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Abandoned and Alone
programme.desc: In Montana, the Raneys help Beth and Mike Ettinger who live in an abandoned ghost town where many previous homesteaders failed. Survival is a battle on this homestead that is stalked by a mountain lion and void of any livestock, water or food.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Under Siege
programme.desc: The Raneys attempt to help the Zabec family in Virginia. With pigs destroying the homestead, predators killing livestock and a huge oak threatening their cabin, the Raneys must convince them that their free-range dream is killing their homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Ozark Mountain Misery
programme.desc: The Raney family goes to the Ozarks, where Marty spent his childhood homesteading, and discovers a malnourished couple and a mouldy cabin that's making them sick. Massive electric storms hit, but the homestead must be built before Mother Nature wins.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Trust or Die
programme.desc: The Deeters are dog-mushers with a homestead on the edge of disaster. Bears dine on the dog food and the forest around them is a deadly tinder box. The Raneys must push them to make drastic changes, but discover the Deeters don't trust outsiders.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: The Hill of Death
programme.desc: The Raneys must save an Oregon homestead trapped at the bottom of a 100 foot cliff separating them from four acres of land they need for food and livestock. Marty risks all forming a road up a bedrock cliff to a forest crawling with mountain lions.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Methane Meltdown
programme.desc: The Raneys have a challenge on their hands as they try to restore a couple's failed homestead in Ohio. Marty's only hope is an old gas well, which if he can get working, can breathe life back into the homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Fury and Fire
programme.desc: Threatened by an approaching wildfire, Stuart and Toni Rinker need a quick solution to their failing Idaho homestead. The Raneys plan to fire-proof the Rinkers' cabin and build a firebreak.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Plummer's Gold

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Date Night
programme.desc: The Chrisley kids show their love for their parents by treating them to a special day of pampering and a romantic dinner, but planning isn't the kids' strong suit. What starts off with good intentions ends up in a comedy of errors.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hey Chloe, It's Your Birthday!
programme.desc: Todd bets Julie he can throw just as fabulous a birthday party for Chloe as she could. The bet is on, but Todd has to do it all on his own. He soon realizes that planning cupcakes and a petting zoo is not as easy as Julie makes it look.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rules for Dating My Teenage Daughter
programme.desc: When Julie announces she's going back to work, Todd must transform into Mr. Mom and take over the household duties. Meanwhile, Savannah feels like she's ready to start dating and pleads her case to go out with a 19-year-old American Idol.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Misadventures in Babysitting
programme.desc: Todd and Julie head out of town, and leave Chase and Savannah at home to watch Grayson overnight for the first time. They hope they will follow the rules, but Chase and Savannah have plans of their own.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Father's Day
programme.desc: It's Father's Day and the kids try and plan a day for dad, but their bright idea of going to an amusement park backfires, as Todd's competitive side turns their planned day of fun into an all-out competition.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Confessions of a Beauty Queen
programme.desc: With Savannah and Chase leaving the nest in the next few years, Todd and Julie decide it's time to downsize.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chase Turns 18
programme.desc: After 18 years of counting down the days, Chase is finally 18! When he tells Todd that he will no longer follow the house rules such as a curfew, Todd decides it’s time to give his son a dose of reality and show him what it’s really like to be an adult.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Anger Management
programme.desc: Todd blames his family for his stress when his doctor tells him that he has high blood pressure. Savannah gives Todd more bad news. Nothing works until Todd finds his own way to relieve his stress, leaving the kids running for cover.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: California Chrisleys
programme.desc: The Chrisleys venture to LA for their regular Beverly Hills haircuts, and for what Todd hopes will be a relaxing family vacation. His plans and sanity are threatened by new levels of Chrisley family craziness when Savannah does something drastic.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Workin' for a Livin'
programme.desc: After Todd unknowingly foots the bill for an extravagant lunch, he wants Chase and Savannah to learn that money doesn't grow on trees. Forced to get summer jobs, the kids struggle to face the reality of a hard day's work for the first time.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Great Outdoors
programme.desc: Todd and Chase are forced to experience the great outdoors when Grayson insists on going camping. While the guys 'rough it' in a luxury RV and terrify Grayson with stories of a haunted lake, Savannah and Julie must go back to driving school.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Marriage Redux
programme.desc: Todd and Julie want to avoid a marriage rut when the kids go to college, so they look for new ways to reconnect and put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Houseguest From Hell
programme.desc: Todd's home life is turned upside down when Julie’s pregnant and very demanding friend comes over to stay a few days. Also, Todd tries to bridge the gap between himself and his oldest daughter Lindsie.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Still Chrisley After All These Years
programme.desc: Julie and Todd decide to celebrate their wedding anniversary by throwing a charity event to raise money for breast cancer. When someone mixes up the dates, however, it’s a mad scramble to try to pull off the biggest party of the year.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Savannah's Big ID-EA
programme.desc: When an influential Southern magazine asks The Chrisleys for an interview about all things fashion, Todd insists on trying to control the situation by writing a script for his family to memorize.

programme.desc: The girls have a night out to help Carrie recover from Berger's break-up message.

programme.title: Sex and the City: A Woman's Right to Shoes
programme.desc: Carrie's expensive new shoes go missing when she attends a friend's baby shower.

programme.desc: Big returns to New York for surgery; Miranda introduces Steve to her new love interest.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The One

programme.title: Sex and the City: Let There Be Light
programme.desc: A relationship heats up between Carrie and Petrovsky; Samantha encounters her ex.

programme.title: Botched: Foreign Bodies
programme.desc: Rajee is back and the doctors attempt to fix her cement-filled face. Terry performs surgery on a woman whose nipples are too high, and an 'out-of-this-world' patient wants to look like an alien.

programme.title: Botched: Plastic Fantastic
programme.desc: After almost dying during a procedure in Ecuador, an ex-Playboy model wants a second chance to fix her neck and nose. Terry tries to help a nurse with one big boob instead of two, and reality star Angelique Morgan wants to be even more plastic.

programme.title: Botched: Here Comes Tummy Boo Hoo
programme.desc: In the season finale, Dr. Nassif helps a fellow Lebanese patient get the nose she wants in time for her wedding, Dr. Dubrow attempts to fix a woman's strip mall boob job, and Mama June from 'Honey Boo Boo' fame needs a fupa lift.

programme.title: Botched: Pinched Perfect
programme.desc: Paul helps a singer find his voice again with a revision rhinoplasty, and Terry reconstructs the chest of a young mother whose surgeon put in two different sized implants. Later, the doctors assist a woman with stretched earlobes.

programme.title: Botched: Man Boobs
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow helps a mother who looks like she's been pregnant for 12 years, Dr. Nassif takes on a woman who hasn't been able to close her mouth since college and the doctors meet with a gambler with a serious case of man boobs.

programme.title: Botched: Supa Fupa
programme.desc: Terry operates on a cancer survivor whose gynecologist did her tummy tuck, Paul performs a reconstructive rhinoplasty on a woman who's been teased about her nose since childhood, and a Brazilian human seeks the doctors' help for botched chest implants.

programme.title: Botched: Totally Waist-ed
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif helps a man who just wants his ears back, and Dr. Dubrow hopes to fix a botched butt implant. Afterward, the doctors meet with a woman who has had 17 surgeries to look like the perfect pixie.

programme.title: Botched: Seeing Double
programme.desc: A fitness enthusiast and nasal spray addict wants Paul to fix her nose, and a woman with deflated boobs comes to Terry for help. Later, the doctors meet the world's most identical twins.

programme.title: Botched: Double D-isaster
programme.desc: Paul helps a female impersonator who isn't comfortable walking the streets without makeup. A woman with 'sideshow boobs' goes under the knife to help her marriage, and the doctors extract silicone star implants from a former body-modification enthusiast.

programme.title: Botched: Reality Star Vixens and Their Afflictions
programme.desc: Dr. Nassif has a ruff case ahead of him when a dog bite victim needs some TLC. Dr. Dubrow has his hands full with an OG reality star's 'Real World' uni-boob situation, while a 'Charm School' dropout turned bootylicious needs help with her derriere.

programme.title: Botched: All I Want For Christmas ...
programme.desc: A mom who claims Santa broke her nose seeks Dr. Nassif's help, while a woman with cobwebbed areolas is haunted by the ghost of surgeries past. Then, a Brazilian bombshell has one last Christmas wish to get her nose fixed.

programme.title: Botched: Bums, Boobs, and Baklava
programme.desc: A British bum ambassador is packing on the pounds to get a Kim K inspired butt while Dr. Dubrow helps a mother of nine battle one of the worst cases of capsular contracture he's ever seen.

programme.title: Botched: Not OK From the UK
programme.desc: A UK patient with a duck butt and bulging belly forces Dr. Dubrow to perform a two-stage revision to restore her 24-year-old body. Meanwhile, another Brit needs Dr. Nassif's help to complete his K-Pop transformation.

programme.title: Chopped: San Franchopco
programme.desc: Four chefs from the same city throw down to find out who's the best in town. In the first round, a mighty midnight snack poses a creative challenge.

programme.title: Chopped: Cinco De Mayo Fiesta
programme.desc: Four cooks are surprised by a Cinco de Mayo theme, and in the first basket, they must grapple with a green pie and a big fish fillet.

programme.title: Chopped: Meat Fight
programme.desc: A beef theme is a meat lover's dream in this competition. The four chefs must cut jumbo-sized ribs down to appetizer-appropriate portions in the first round.

programme.title: Chopped: Beat the Judge: Amanda
programme.desc: Three champions arrive back in the Chopped kitchen with their sights set on taking down a formidable foe, esteemed judge Amanda Freitag.

programme.title: Chopped: Beat the Judge: Marc

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Fishing For a Win

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Some Like It Spicy
programme.desc: Alex kicks of the season with four chefs staking out customers at Fry's Marketplace in Phoenix. One chef must go after cooking breakfast to go, and the parking lot heats up something spicy. The judges decide who has the guiltiest pleasure.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quick and Easy: One Pan
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is focusing on quick and easy one-pan meals, starting with fresh and crunchy turkey taco lettuce wraps with Pico de Gallo.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Truly Madly Crazy
programme.desc: Ree cooks up some crazy, fun ideas for game night food. There's a whole new take on a football favorite with pull-apart Pizza Rolls, then over-the-top Hawaiian burgers piled high with grilled pineapple.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Old-Fashioned Comfort
programme.desc: It's comfort from start to finish, and Ree Drummond's spelling it out in an old-fashioned, feel good way. First, C is for casserole -- tuna noodle casserole, that is. O is for open spaces and the great outdoors.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Mom's Day
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes Italian chicken soup for lunch.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Waste Not, Want Not
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is reclaiming kitchen scraps and transforming them into star dishes. Peels, stems and bones destined for the trash are instead turned into crispy roasted potato peels, stir fried broccoli stems and an awesome all-purpose chicken broth.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Staying Home 3
programme.desc: Ree and her family film a mix of easy quarantine recipes and fun outtakes. Ree puts a spin on pantry, fridge and freezer staples with her hash brown tostadas and fancy grilled PB&J, a mashup of two favourites.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Lunch for the Crew
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is preparing a well-deserved lunch at the lodge for the cowboy crew. She makes a crispy-coated ranch favorite, chicken fried steak sliders piled on beautiful, warm buttermilk biscuits and served with buttermilk gravy.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Comfort Food Cook-Off
programme.desc: Guy Fieri brings four comfort food experts to Flavortown to compete in games that will push them out of their comfort zone. First, the chefs must make their signature dish while incorporating a list of mandatory ingredients.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG Judges and Their Siblings
programme.desc: The flavourtown family gets a little bigger as some of GGG's most beloved judges bring their siblings to compete alongside them. First, the teams must shop for everything in their 'Childhood Favourite.'

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Clash of the Vegetarians!
programme.desc: When four veggie masters compete in three veggie-inspired rounds, they prove that leafy greens and nutrient-packed beans have more protein than meets the eye.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Spice Games
programme.desc: Four chefs who like their food with some heat fight for the title of Spice Master by making a spicy high-end dinner with ingredients for bread pudding, playing Spree Ball to determine their dish's pepper and creating a spicy guilty pleasure.

programme.desc: One year ago, Ron and Mishelle bought this five generation, century old home from his parents. Ron loves the legacy home, but Mishelle misses their bungalow in the city.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Trouble With Cobbles

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All Bricked Out

programme.desc: Tamara gets creative renovating a 1950 ranch-style home updating the exterior with faux stone, using a second-story addition to create three new bedrooms and gutting the master suite.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Lady and the Damp
programme.desc: Tamara takes on a water damaged French Provincial in Leawood, Kansas. Years of neglect have destroyed the basement and Tamara will need to be completely redo it.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Outrage
programme.desc: While chasing a heroin supplier, CPD crosses paths with a convicted criminal recently released on a technicality. Halstead's history with the man threatens the team's ability to put him back in prison.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Night in Chicago
programme.desc: Atwater goes undercover to bring down the longtime head of a criminal enterprise and becomes entangled in a situation that tests his allegiances as well as his conscience.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Ties That Bind
programme.desc: The team travels to a Wisconsin gun show to take down a supplier who's manufacturing 'cop killer' machine guns. Before going undercover together, Burgess discovers that Upton is dating Ruzek.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Good Men
programme.desc: Using information from Chicago Fire's Cruz, Intelligence chases down the robbery crew using the lockbox key. Voight is under pressure to bring the crew to justice without tarnishing the reputation of a murdered firefighter who might have been involved.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Forgotten
programme.desc: Voight's 'stay out of politics' stance is challenged as Intelligence uncovers the details surrounding a prolific serial killer.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Pain Killer
programme.desc: A mayoral candidate is shot by an unidentified sniper and CPD races to catch the shooter before he can take out his next target.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: This City
programme.desc: With the threat of a gang war looming, Voight and Ray Price must organize a peace summit to end the bloodshed before more innocent people get hurt. Burgess evaluates her future with Blair.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Could Have Been
programme.desc: Intelligence's investigation into the murder of Burgess's boyfriend threatens to reveal a dark side she was unaware of. The real motivation for his murder uncovers a much more unsettling truth.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Sacrifice
programme.desc: A violent crew is hitting pharmaceutical delivery trucks and stealing drugs, but their motivation is more complicated than just money. The case tests Upton and Ruzek’s relationship.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Outside the Lines
programme.desc: After a crypto currency farm is robbed of over $10 million in Bitcoin codes, Sam and Hidoko go undercover, with Sam resuming a likely-compromised former alias.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets in a Small Town
programme.desc: A mother of three went missing from her home in Alabama, and the news the family received would haunt them forever.

programme.title: Snapped: Tracy Lawson
programme.desc: After a deadly fight, a mother’s secrets are exposed but she has a few surprises for the jury.

programme.title: Snapped: Vonlee Nicole Titlow
programme.desc: After an alcoholic millionaire dies of seemingly natural causes, an unexpected betrayal reveals there may be more to the victim's death, and to his beautiful party-girl niece, than first meets the eye.

programme.title: The Jury Speaks: O.J. Simpson
programme.desc: A new look at the OJ Simpson trial through the eyes of original jurors, discussing evidence they weren’t allowed to see during the trial and the horrors of a 10-month sequestration. With new information, will their verdict change after a revote?

programme.title: The Jury Speaks: Michael Jackson
programme.desc: Members of the original jury, who acquitted Jackson of the molestation of a teenage boy, examine new accusations and hard truths about the superstar’s life. Given the chance to revote, will their outcome change?

programme.title: The Jury Speaks: George Zimmerman
programme.desc: The case that infamously sparked the Black Lives Matter movement. Zimmerman was found not guilty for the murder of unarmed teen, Trayvon Martin. We hear from the jurors as they justify the hardest decision of their lives.

programme.title: The Jury Speaks: Robert Durst
programme.desc: In 2015, Durst was caught on tape professing, 'I killed them all'. We sit down with jurors who found the now-confessed killer not guilty of murder in 2003, and examine the possibility of a misled jury, and the outcome of their revote.

programme.title: The Jury Speaks: Robert Blake
programme.desc: Through the eyes of the jurors, re-examine some of the most controversial cases.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: Deadly Design
programme.desc: Brooklyn shop keepers are afraid of closing time as a killer shoots his victims while locking up their stores. Police release surveillance footage to the press and ask the public for help to find a duffle bag wielding murderer before he strikes again.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: The Other Zodiac
programme.desc: In the 1990's, New York is on edge as a killer leaves coded clues at crime scenes and declares his compulsion to choose victims by their birth signs. Police race against time before he can achieve twelve killings to complete the Zodiac.

programme.title: Snapped: Verginia Turner
programme.desc: A possible love triangle has deadly consequences for a prominent California lawyer.

programme.title: Snapped: Melissa Napier
programme.desc: When a determined son urges police to investigate the disappearance of his father, he is met with a storm of family tragedy and betrayal.

programme.title: Snapped: Joanna McElrath
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a fellow officer plunges detectives into a cavern of secrets and lies.

programme.title: Snapped: Margaret Litchfield
programme.desc: When a popular construction man in a tight-knit Texas town is found gunned down in his own home, it takes police a decade and a half to track down the killer.

programme.title: Movie: Deepwater Horizon
programme.desc: When the Deepwater Horizon drilling rig explodes, the crew suddenly finds the building collapsing around them. Crew member Mike Williams, thinking of his family, fights to escape the rig alive. The crew works together to save as many as they can.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Brick Like Me
programme.desc: Homer wakes up in a world where his family and everyone in Springfield are made of Legos. Can he 'put together' how he got there and figure out how to get home before he's stuck in a world of bricks forever?

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Yellow Badge of Cowardge

programme.title: The Simpsons: Clown in the Dumps

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXV

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Dark Secrets of the Sphinx

programme.title: Mythical Beasts: Revenge of the Cyclops
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that the cyclops, a one-eyed cannibal, could have been more than just a story.

programme.title: Unearthed: Babylon's Forbidden Wonders
programme.desc: New archaeological discoveries are revealing the secrets behind the downfall of the once-mighty city of Babylon. Using cutting-edge methods, experts unearth fresh evidence of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World said to have once existed here.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Lost City of the Ark
programme.desc: The long-lost city of Tanis is home to some of the strangest ruins in ancient Egypt, and using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate if it is indeed the resting place of the Ark of the Covenant.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tower of Babel: The New Evidence
programme.desc: The Tower of Babel is one of the most famous stories of the Bible, and to find out if it really existed, archaeologists use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate how ancient engineers could have built such an extraordinary megastructure.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Lost City of the Ark
programme.desc: The long-lost city of Tanis is home to some of the strangest ruins in ancient Egypt, and using cutting-edge technology, experts investigate if it is indeed the resting place of the Ark of the Covenant.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Babylon
programme.desc: Special access to cutting-edge archaeological investigations reveals the secrets of the long-lost city that was once the world's largest and richest. Using new evidence, experts might finally discover what Babylon looked like and what caused its downfall.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Ice Zombies
programme.desc: A zombie reindeer haunts the mountains of Norway. Strange circles appear in the sand by a secret US military base. A gigantic streak in the Arctic points towards alien life. Cutting-edge technology helps experts answer these mysteries from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Forbidden City of Inca Gold
programme.desc: Treasure hunters have searched for a lost Incan city of untold wealth for a century, but new technology might finally locate its riches. A strange mountain in Egypt sparks an investigation into Cleopatra's gems and the tomb of Alexander the Great.

programme.title: What on Earth?: North Korea's Forbidden Islands
programme.desc: Man-made islands are spotted near a North Korean missile facility. When something unexpected is found in a remote desert, experts investigate a lost city of giants. A strange discovery in Siberia could reveal a secret mission to the center of the earth.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Blood in the Garden of Eden
programme.desc: A site that could be the Garden of Eden hides a deadly secret. When a gateway to hell suddenly opens, experts investigate where it leads. A mysterious shipwreck could be an infamous Soviet KGB pirate ship.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Cave to Hell
programme.desc: When a sinister cave is discovered in a remote corner of Iceland, experts uncover a secret underworld tunneling to unknown depths, and using cutting-edge tech, they investigate if this strange place could hold secrets of alien worlds.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Black Powder Blast
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts of the battlefield who recreate black powder blasts from the Civil War, and using cutting-edge technology, they experiment with this simple yet deadly explosive.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Fighting Fire with Fire
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet the expert firefighters who use cutting-edge explosive technology to battle dangerous infernos, and using the latest science, they'll find if the best antidote to fire is more fire.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Blowing Up Hollywood
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy go behind-the-scenes at a premier Hollywood special effects company to reveal the secrets of the world's greatest movie explosions and how cutting-edge tech pushes cinematic carnage to new heights.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Fireworks Declassified
programme.desc: Go behind-the-scenes at one of the world's largest fireworks companies, and reveal the explosive secrets and cutting-edge innovations of its world-class pyrotechnics experts.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: FBI Bomb Squad
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts from the FBI's bomb squad to reveal the cutting-edge forensics and technology required to investigate deadly bomb threats and neutralize them.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: When Mountains Explode
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts using cutting-edge explosives to turn entire mountains into gravel-sized bits essential for construction, and their investigation reveals the high-powered, hi-tech process behind this dangerous work.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Oil Rig vs. Sinkhole
programme.desc: When an oil rig in a Louisiana lake drills in the wrong place, it causes a massive whirlpool that drains the entire lake; experts investigate why this sinkhole disaster was one of the greatest engineering catastrophes in American history.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Deepwater Disaster
programme.desc: The Deepwater Horizon oil rig drilled into the deepest oil reserves on the planet, but a sudden explosion on-board led to the worst oil spill in history. Experts reveal what went wrong and how cutting-edge science finally fixed this catastrophe.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hot Tempers, Cold Hearts
programme.desc: When these Deadly Women turn green-eyed they reveal their hot tempers and cold hearts.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Keep It In the Family
programme.desc: When these Deadly Women strike they keep it 'In The Family'.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Vow to Kill
programme.desc: Commitments’ out clause is 'til death do us part.

programme.title: Diabolical: Daddy's Little Nightmare
programme.desc: In 2017, Federal Heights, Colorado is filled with fear when 69-year-old veteran Bill Mussack is reported missing gone without a trace. Police act fast to uncover a diabolical killer with a heinous plot, before this malicious murderer strikes again.

programme.title: Diabolical: Killer Track Record
programme.desc: Three women die of the same mysterious illness, the hunt is on to prove their deaths are no accident. Investigators don't know that they are being played for fools by a sinister killer lurking undetected. There's only one woman who can bring him down.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: It Wasn't Me
programme.desc: In 1992, Roosevelt Myles, a small-time drug dealer, is convicted of murdering a teenage boy on Chicago's West Side. Now, his sister and fiancée have reached out to Chris and Fatima, convinced he is serving time for a crime he didn't commit.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: All News Is Local
programme.desc: In August 2000, 19-year-old Jessica Carpenter was found dead in her Aiken, SC home by her own mother. Local reporters and family members tell the story of a town frozen in terror as police search for a possible serial killer on the loose.

programme.title: Diabolical: Killer Track Record
programme.desc: Three women die of the same mysterious illness, the hunt is on to prove their deaths are no accident. Investigators don't know that they are being played for fools by a sinister killer lurking undetected. There's only one woman who can bring him down.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: It Wasn't Me
programme.desc: In 1992, Roosevelt Myles, a small-time drug dealer, is convicted of murdering a teenage boy on Chicago's West Side. Now, his sister and fiancée have reached out to Chris and Fatima, convinced he is serving time for a crime he didn't commit.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Route 29
programme.desc: In August 2013, a 17-year-old rising social media star and high school athlete disappeared along the infamous Route 29. A massive search by local and federal authorities yielded zero results until a security video revealed a chilling clue.

programme.title: Diabolical: Mistress Roulette
programme.desc: Dr. Adam Frasch has a dangerous secret: he has an insatiable appetite for women. He collects them as he does exotic cars, but unlike cars, he stashes them in his various properties, hiding them from one another, and especially his wife.

programme.title: Twisted: Railway Killers
programme.desc: Childhood friends John Duffy and David Mulcahy shared many common interests but as they got older their interests took a darker turn resulting in brutal rapes and murders of women in the 1980s.

programme.title: Twisted: Tampa Bay Slayer
programme.desc: Bobby Joe Long was a brutal and ruthless killer who terrorised women in Florida before his arrest in 1984 where he claimed to have also raped over 50 women.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: Two neighbors in New Brighton, Minnesota get along great until one of them catches Lyme Disease from the deer the other feeds on his property. The ensuing blame game, hostility and rising conflict ends in gunfire, death, injury and ruin.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: There Bleeds the Neighborhood
programme.desc: A friendship between two Ohio neighbours begins as peaceful, but over time descends into rancor and violence, ending in a bloody battle.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Lake of Madness
programme.desc: A family moves into their dream home on a Minnesota lake, and welcomes the single retiree who soon takes up residence next door. But a dispute over access to the water they all love escalates until one party snaps, and others pay the price in blood.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: The War Next Door
programme.desc: A family loves everything about their new home except the mockingbirds that perch and squawk in the backyard lemon tree. Their efforts to scare them off start a feud with their neighbors that spins out of control until one of them lies dead.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Driveway of Death
programme.desc: In the idyllic hills of Carmel Canyon, California, wealthy neighbors get into a dispute over everything from shared roads and bridges to upkeep of their respective properties. Anger finally boils over and the feud is resolved with fatal gunfire.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Fatal Family Feud
programme.desc: When two families settle next to each other in lovely Euclid, Ohio, expectations are they will get along famously. But when one family's daughter rebuffs the high school crush of the other family's son, the stage is set for conflict, and murder.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Deadly Duplex
programme.desc: After an early retirement, a man buys a duplex and rents half of it out to a troubled family. With the help of his gun, he sends an abusive husband packing and sets his sights on the wife.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: The Bad Son
programme.desc: Matthew Heikkila has always had a rocky relationship with his parents, but he has a plan on how to deal with them. On a cold November day, he murders them in their own home - and is determined to keep the nightmare going for his own girlfriend.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Horror in the Heartland
programme.desc: Two teenagers in love go missing from rural Ohio. Ten days later, they both turn up dead - brutally hacked to bits. The crime tears the small town apart and remains unsolved for 25 years, until the shocking truth comes to light.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: The Devil Went Down to Georgia
programme.desc: After a recent encounter with a peeping tom outside his daughter's bedroom window and another with a masked man in his own hallway, Jerry Glaser thinks someone is trying to kill him and takes his life into his own hands to protect himself and his family.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Life on the Line
programme.desc: Cousins Ana Franklin and Jennifer Holliday are traveling home late one night when terror strikes. As Jennifer is taken hostage by an unstable man, she soon connects with a 9-1-1 operator who will stop at nothing to see that Jennifer makes it out alive.

programme.title: Weaponology: Armored Personnel Carriers
programme.desc: Trace the family trees of the greatest fighting vehicles and armoured personnel carriers in history.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols
programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: Combat Tech: Bombers
programme.desc: Go inside the most dominant and lethal military aircraft, from the bombers that won the War to the B-52, from the stealth B-2 to the most advanced and top secret bombers of the future.

programme.title: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican Archives hold the personal documents of past Popes, including pieces such as Galileo's trial transcript and King Henry VIII's annulment request. What else is hidden in the Vatican Library a place that is out of bounds even to Cardinals?

programme.title: Forbidden History: Bulgaria's Murder Service
programme.desc: The crimes perpetrated in the name of Communism remain largely unexplored. Millions of people died in a secret war with the West. Hear the extraordinary story of the Bulgarian secret department called Service Seven (a killer force operating worldwide).

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mao: China's Chairman of Death
programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.desc: Mark hires a family friend to build a custom log house for him to retire in. The budget has been maxed out and the home isn’t done, so he sends out an SOS that Mike Holmes answers.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Broken Record
programme.desc: Mike and his team come to the rescue of Sheila and Val, a couple scammed out of their money, their kitchen and their trust by a notorious contracting criminal who would occasionally do one good job to lure other unsuspecting clients.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Urea Got Me
programme.desc: Mike gets called to a house recently retrofitted with a substance that’s been banned in Canada for decades.
