programme.desc: Things don't go as planned when Tasha and Kelly decide to throw an engagement party.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: The Fixer
programme.desc: Mike hopes to get brothers-in-law Ryan and Kyle to learn how to fix things around the house by pitting them against one another. Meanwhile, Eve is caught off-guard when her boyfriend tells her that he loves her.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Sherri Shepherd, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Natasha Leggero, and Jamie Kennedy.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Smith vs. Smith
programme.desc: A woman undergoes a polygraph examination because her husband suspects she’s back to her cheating ways.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: How Do You Do/ It's Just a Scratch
programme.desc: Jealous altercation leads to injuries. Car is scratched while neighbor attempts to offer help.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: You Are Feeling Very Very Smoky/ Ripped Uniform
programme.desc: A woman sues a hypnotist after she is unable to quit smoking; a dog-sitter sues over damaged clothing.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Ask Dr. LaViola
programme.desc: Dr. Jamie LaViola discusses how improvements to your smile can make a big difference. Don't let your fear of the dentist, or being too busy, keep you away from the smile you've always wanted.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Wallace vs. Wallace
programme.desc: A woman claims her ex-husband’s paternity doubt surrounding her two-year-old daughter is fueled by his new wife and wants to set the record straight.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: No Debt Mommy / Babysitter Bummer
programme.desc: A stepson is accused of trespassing and a babysitter seeks compensation for her damaged laptop.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Happy Trampy Mother's Day
programme.desc: Sierra's boyfriend Trevor has been cheating on her with a woman named Jordan. Macie slept with her classmate Seham's boyfriend Camron because Seham stole one of her clients. Tahnee is competing for her boyfriend Darryl's affection with her mother Angie.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman is suing her deceased mother’s fiancé, claiming the woman attacked her and stole some of her mother’s property. The defendant believes the woman did not approve of their relationship.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Not Making The Cut ' and ' Yanking A Guy's Chain.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segment features cases 'Refusing to Fold ', ' Cooking Up A Lawsuit ' and ' Terminating A Tenant'.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: So Loud I Broke Your Wall/ Jet Ski Scandal
programme.desc: An extreme response to a noise complaint; a damaged jet ski.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: An ex-bridesmaid is sued for stealing and pawning an engagement ring. Then, a couple claim to have been conned into helping a financially distressed family, and are suing for payments and damages to their car. The defendants say they were duped.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Show Our Daughters Porn and Molest Them?
programme.desc: Sandra accuses Marcus of molesting their young daughters and showing them porn. Plus, Max is accused of molesting his son after the child told a doctor that his dad touched him.

programme.title: Maury: Denied for 19 Years ... Today I'll Prove You're My Dad!
programme.desc: Estan is convinced Stephanie cheated and may not be her daughter's father. Cheryl and her daughter Kajane are her to prove Kaga is Kajanae's daughter. Sabrina wants to prove her ex KT is the father of both her sons.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: I Cheated 40 Times
programme.desc: Malik doesn't want to be in a relationship and has cheated with 40 different women. He's engaged to his fiancée Dominique, but marriage should be the furthest thing from his mind.

programme.title: The Mel Robbins Show: Mel! Save My Reputation
programme.desc: Rachel Dolezal's reputation was ruined after she claimed to be a black woman despite being biologically white. Today, she explains to Mel why she's still trying to defend herself.

programme.title: Movie: A Thousand Words
programme.desc: After an encounter with a spiritual guru, a literary agent finds an odd tree in his yard that loses a leaf each time the agent speaks.

programme.title: Movie: In a World ...
programme.desc: A woman finds herself competing against her own father in the movie trailer voice-over profession.

programme.title: Movie: Good Boys
programme.desc: A young boy is invited to his first kissing party, he asks his best friends to help him get ready, and along the way, they encounter mayhem and mischief.

programme.title: Movie: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: After being picked as her best friend's maid of honour, a broke woman tries to bluff her way through the expensive bridesmaid rituals.

programme.title: Movie: Can You Keep a Secret?
programme.desc: A woman on a flight, thinking the plane is about to crash, discloses all her secrets to a seeming stranger, then later finds out the man is actually the CEO of the company she is working for.

programme.title: Movie: Cedar Rapids
programme.desc: A man leaves his sleepy town for the first time in 34 years to represent his insurance company at a convention.

programme.title: Movie: Down to You
programme.desc: A man finds the girl of his dreams only to discover that she is not ready for commitment.

programme.title: Movie: The Kids Are All Right
programme.desc: When the teenage children of a lesbian couple become curious about their biological father, the fabric of the family begins to unravel.

programme.title: Movie: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York
programme.desc: A young boy mistakenly takes the wrong plane when his family goes on Christmas vacation and ends up in New York City, fending off suspicious hotel staff, a kindly bird woman in disguise and two burglars he fought against last Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: College
programme.desc: During an orientation visit at Fieldmont University, best friends Kevin, Carter and Morris fall in with one of the rowdiest fraternities on campus. As new recruits, they are subjected to endless humiliations and to the no-holds-barred college party scene.

programme.title: Movie: Due Date
programme.desc: After being kicked off an airplane, a man must rent a car and drive cross-country with the person who got him on the no-fly list, in order to make it to his child's birth on time.

programme.title: Bill Maher: Live from Tulsa, Oklahoma
programme.desc: Bill Maher's eleventh solo special on HBO comes to you from Tulsa, Oklahoma.

programme.title: Movie: The Nice Guys
programme.desc: In 1970s Los Angeles, private eye Holland March is forced to work with a hired enforcer to solve the case of a missing girl and the apparent suicide of a porn star. As their investigation progresses, they uncover the roots of a large conspiracy.

programme.title: Movie: American Pie
programme.desc: A group of high-school seniors enter a pact to lose their virginity before graduation.

programme.title: Movie: Twins
programme.desc: Years after they were separated at birth, a genetically engineered fraternal twin goes to Hollywood to find his brother.

programme.title: Longhorn Arts & Culture: Cactus Cafe: Steel Betty
programme.desc: This episode showcases Steel Betty, a distinctively-Austin band that keeps toes tapping with a mix of traditional bluegrass tunes and original folk compositions.

programme.title: Bevo XV
programme.desc: An inside look at the process of choosing and grooming the next Texas mascot.

programme.title: LHN Stories: XVII
programme.desc: Sam Ehlinger, Andrew Jones and Alex Watson are three Texas athletes who exemplify the term 'Texas Tough.' We chronicle the obstacles they have had to overcome and how these experiences shaped their lives.

programme.title: LHN Stories: XII
programme.desc: Shane Buechele honours a childhood friend every game, Jhonattan Vegas takes a path from Venezuela to the PGA Tour, the author of Dear Andrew discusses his battle with leukemia and Matt Coleman's recruitment builds to on of the best games of his career.

programme.title: Longhorn Arts & Culture: LBJ Summit on Race: Valerie Jarrett
programme.desc: Moderated by activist Brittany Packnett, Jarrett discusses her time as senior advisor to President Barack Obama, the complex issue of race in America and her hope for the 2020 election.

programme.title: Longhorn Arts & Culture: LBJ Summit on Race: Motown, Sixty Years of 'Hitsville, USA'
programme.desc: Four Motown legends speak on the history and influence of the music, decades of memories and the crucial role that Motown played in integrating America.
The 50th anniversary of Texas' first ever football national championship is celebrated.

programme.title: LHN Stories: XVIII
programme.desc: For Pride Month, we highlight the stories of David Alviar, Jacob Cornish and Jordan Windle. Three athletes who have experienced personal journeys that have shaped their athletic careers.

programme.title: LHN Stories: XIII
programme.desc: Jordan and Jerry Windle share a bond and Mo Bamba was shaped by the courts of Harlem. Plus, look at Connor Williams's experience at the NFL draft.
